text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 45 

MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The type of managed care plan that corresponds to MC_PLAN_ID 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 01 = Comprehensive Managed Care 
Organization (MCO) 
02 = Traditional Primary Care Case 
Management
